name: poc-micro-front
description: POC d'architecture micro-frontends : legacy Angular 16 + shell moderne Angular 21 + MFE Module Federation puis Native Federation

scripts.install:phase1: cd legacy-shell && npm install && cd ../mfe-stats && npm install && cd ../mfe-notifications && npm install
scripts.dev:phase1: concurrently -n shell,stats,notif -c blue,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix legacy-shell run start" "npm --prefix mfe-stats run start" "npm --prefix mfe-notifications run start"
